comment: pleme-io/ferrite#check — the Go compile-time memory-safety analyzer. Resolved at IFD via builtins.getFlake against this locked rev (mirrors gen-pin.json). Until then the ferrite node's derivation runs the shipped ferrite-check (no per-package PoMS emission flag yet) — the graph wiring + cache-key alignment is proven at eval; the realize path is gated on the f0 rev bump.
